git_rules.merge_to_main: ONLY when score is confirmed better than previous best — ask user before merging

steps.description: Project scaffold — config.py (single source of truth for ALL parameters), requirements.txt, __init__.py files, folder structure.

Read the full API docs — paste contents of 'Simulation Mechanics', 'API Endpoints', 'Scoring', and 'Quickstart' pages from docs.ainm.no into PROBLEM.md. Fill in ALL open questions: 6 terrain types, exact request/response format, auth method, coordinate system. No code until this is done.
steps.why: Building on wrong assumptions burns queries we can never get back. Know the format before writing a single line of client code.
steps.deliverable: PROBLEM.md fully filled in — zero open questions remaining

steps.description: API Discovery script — scripts/api_discovery.py: authenticate with token, fire exactly ONE /simulate call with a minimal viewport, print the raw JSON response. Verify it matches the docs. Zero logic, just a probe.
steps.budget_impact: Costs 1 query — confirm you have the token set before running
steps.key_question: Does the real response match the documented format?

steps.description: API Client — src/api/client.py + src/api/models.py: typed wrapper with methods simulate(seed, x, y, width, height) and submit(seed, tensor). Handles auth headers, HTTP errors. No raw requests calls anywhere else in the codebase.

Budget Manager — src/observation/budget_manager.py: persists query count to data/budget.json. HARD STOP at TOTAL_QUERIES=50 — raises BudgetExhaustedError before any API call is made. Every simulate() call MUST pass through this gate.
steps.critical: This is the safety net — blowing the budget cannot be undone

steps.description: Query Planner — src/observation/query_planner.py: generate list of (seed, x, y, w, h) for 9 non-overlapping tiles covering full 40x40 map per seed (45 queries), plus 5 spare queries held for re-querying uncertain areas after initial scan.
steps.math: ceil(40/15)=3 → 3x3=9 tiles at x=[0,15,30], y=[0,15,30]; last column/row tiles are 10 cells wide

steps.description: Observation Runner — src/observation/runner.py: executes query plan, calls BudgetManager then APIClient per query, saves raw response JSON to data/observations/seed{seed}_x{x}_y{y}.json immediately after each call. Never batch — save after every single query.
steps.important: Save after EVERY query — if script crashes at query 43, we keep all 43

steps.description: Data Analysis — scripts/analyze_observations.py: load all saved observations, print terrain frequency per type, print ASCII coverage map (observed vs unobserved cells), count how many times each cell was seen across seeds.

Terrain Estimator — src/model/terrain_estimator.py: per-cell probability distributions. Observed cells: use empirical frequency across sim seeds (stochastic samples). Unobserved cells: use global observed frequency as prior — NOT uniform, NOT zero.
steps.scoring_note: Confident wrong answer = worst penalty. Never output [1,0,0,0,0,0] unless cell was observed 100% same terrain across all queries.

steps.description: Tensor Builder — src/prediction/tensor_builder.py: assembles W×H×6 numpy array from terrain estimator output. Hard assertion: each row sums to 1.0 ± epsilon. Saves to data/predictions/seed{seed}_tensor.npy and .json.

main.py — full pipeline orchestration: load config → plan queries → run observations → estimate terrain → build tensors → submit all 5 seeds. Each stage is a clearly named function. Prints budget remaining after each query.

Submit & Score — post all 5 seed predictions, record score + timestamp in data/scores.json. Compare to previous best. If better: create PR victor → main and ask user to confirm merge. If not better: go back to step 9 and improve model.
steps.branch_rule: No push to remote. No merge to main. Only create a PR when score is verified better.
